qa_pairs.question: What were the key performance metrics reported for the LAMMPS simulation of 4000 atoms over 25,000 steps using 12 MPI tasks?
qa_pairs.answer: The LAMMPS simulation achieved a performance of 696,931.853 tau/day and 1,613.268 timesteps/s. It utilized 90.2% CPU with 12 MPI tasks and 1 OpenMP thread.

qa_pairs.question: In the LAMMPS simulation of 4000 atoms with 12 MPI tasks, what percentage of the total time was spent in the Pair and Communication sections?
qa_pairs.answer: The Pair section consumed 46.45% of the total time, while the Communication section accounted for 44.50%.
